about.label: ABOUT ME
about.text: I'm a full-stack and mobile developer focused on turning ideas into real products. I enjoy building modern web applications and mobile experiences that are fast, fluid, and visually clean. Specialized in: clean architecture, scalable code, and software that actually reaches users' hands.

fullstack.title:
FULL‑STACK
DEVELOPMENT
fullstack.desc: I build responsive and performant applications with React, Node.js, Laravel, and databases. From landing pages and corporate management systems to complete SaaS products.

mobile.title:
MOBILE
DEVELOPMENT
mobile.desc: Creating smooth, native‑feeling mobile experiences for iOS and Android from a single codebase. UI polish, animations, and offline support.

uiux.title:
UI / UX
DESIGN
uiux.desc: Creating clean, intentional interfaces that balance aesthetics with usability. Component libraries and accessibility‑first thinking.

backend.title:
API &
BACKEND
backend.desc: Architecting APIs, database schemas, authentication flows, and real‑time features. Node.js, Laravel, PostgreSQL, Firebase, and cloud deployments.

njila.desc: Architecting and scaling cross-platform mobile applications primarily using React Native to digitize public transit and urban mobility ecosystems. Spearheaded full-stack web features utilizing Vue.js, Laravel, and Inertia.js to deliver seamless, monolithic-speed user interfaces.

tchiiwa.desc: Leading frontend development across Tchiiwa's applications on a microfrontend architecture. Responsible for the web and mobile frontends of core products, including Tchiiwa Learn — an enterprise-grade Learning Management System.

aliacars.desc: A comprehensive fleet management and car rental architecture comprising dual cross-platform mobile apps (Client & Partner) synchronized with real-time web dashboards for vehicle owners and internal operations.

freelance.desc: Delivering robust, end-to-end technical solutions for diverse business verticals. Designed and deployed custom corporate management systems, performance-optimized landing pages, and high-availability backends using Express.js, Next.js, and Laravel.
